Row.Text: Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.
Mycenaean Tier 2 Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.
Mycenaean Tier 3 Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.

Mycenaean Unique Merchant. Civilian who can establish a [icon:TRADE_ROUTE] Trade Route to import [icon:RADIAL_RESOURCES] Resources from a foreign Settlement. +50 [icon:YIELD_CULTURE] Culture when using the Create a Road Action.
